Bone Talisman  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +4
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except SHD NEC BST
Race: ALL except ERU DEF TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Post Comment
aviak charm
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2003 at 1:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789974339
6 posts
I got the aviak charm off of an aviak avocet at the top of the aviak city in south karana. He conned light blue to my lvl 40 paladin,
▲ Page top
Sell me on it
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2002 at 5:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759301666
136 posts
Ok tell me why I should risk my butt JUST going against the Aviak I need for the charm let alone the pelt which right now is still ridicliously above me. I got a Shiny Brass Shield in crushbone off a lvl12 character which has AC 10, +10 magic resist, and is a light source (weak but still it's a light) Why should this be such a great thing, aside from getting people to visit Kerra Island. Only advantage I can see is you would learn stuff a little bit faster as long as you rely on Wis and not Int (in which case see the testament post)

Get it if you got time to burn between dragon raids and are feeling nostalgic for gear that is so beyond the level it's makes obtaining it a pointless. Unless you work in teams to get all the parts (ok I know the fangs are piddly but the charm aint, that takes outstanding team work for anyone below 25!!) what's so great about this?

Edited, Mon Jul 15 18:01:47 2002
▲ Page top
Testament of Vanear is way better
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 7:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776258334
3 posts
This item sucks! You are better off going and getting the Testament of Vanear if you want the wis. It is +10wis and +10mana. Much better second melee slot
▲ Page top
RE: Testament of Vanear is way better
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2002 at 7:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1688948237917
View User Forum
236 posts
Yea, with that Testament, wish this Bone Talisman fit in the range slot, like there's enough range slot items.
▲ Page top
RE: Testament of Vanear is way better
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2002 at 1:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591773916956
View User Forum
Sage
164 posts
It depends on what you're after. If you're after WIS, Testament is much better. But if you're trying to boost your magic resist, this is well worth the small effort.
▲ Page top
Don't waste the aviak charm
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2002 at 2:19 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
The aviak charm can be used to quest crafted gauntlets, which are actually good. This thing is lame, considering you have to get other stuff along with an aviak charm. For the crafted, you just need two star rubies, which cost about 130pp for both. The gauntlets are worth 250-300pp usually, and sell fast.
▲ Page top
Bone Talisman
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2002 at 7:17 AM Rating: Decent
Debalic
Prodigal Son
20,643 posts
Ahh, so this thing comes from Kerra....
My Cleric got one at around 30th level, I don't recall how but I think I bought it for about 20-25pp as part of a deal with other items. Good cheap item for WIS casters, and MR is always a good thing. Still using it at 36th. Most people would tell me to get a "real" item but I have no qualms for now.

▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2002 at 10:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758920218
1 post
Do you get faction hits for killing the tiger?
▲ Page top
RE: Faction
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2003 at 2:25 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591755902996
Sage
293 posts
If you mean the tiger in the Ak'Anon zoo, no, there are no faction hits for killing it.

That tiger drops a tiger hide perhaps 10-20% of the time, but he's a quick spawn so you most likely won't need to spend more than an hour or two killing tigers before one drops for you.

:)

▲ Page top

# Jan 13 2002 at 12:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245640143
30 posts

can anyone tell me how much it goes for on my server?

QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2001 at 4:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1645402601679
3 posts
prexus I meant prexus
▲ Page top
How Much?
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2001 at 9:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251981113
31 posts
I just finished this quest last night and didn't even have a chance to try and auction it yet. I see people posted selling these for 200 plat, but is that the norm? how much can I really expect to get for mine in an auction?
▲ Page top
RE: How Much?
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2002 at 2:01 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
I doubt you could get anywhere near 200pp for this, unless you trick a newbie into buying it. The reason is this: A charred Guardian shield has 10ac, and 9 wisdom, and is only 300-400pp. Similarly, the Testament of vanear is 10wis and 10 mana, and is an easy quest, abtainable by a lvl 16 or so. By the time anyone is interested in resists, they will be high enough level to have better than a bone talisman, or will be buying something better than this. If this was range slot, or even primary, It would be worth a bit, but there are too many easy to get secondary slot items that have more wis than this.

I'd guess 25pp, like the post above suggests. Might be good until your reach lvl 16, and can get the Testament.
▲ Page top
seeking talisman
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2001 at 9:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766328130
2 posts
if anyone here has it on povar and wants to sell it i am buying please send me an email or send tell in game ill pay 75pp for one but that is negotiable
▲ Page top
guidos
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2001 at 1:24 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249543153
27 posts
i've done this quest twice, both times not taking me more than an hour. i was bound in the zoo, right next to the tiger, i'd root it (a must, or the tiger runs off and never comes back, really annoying), then careless lightning once or twice. if he didn't drop the pelt, i'd go get a mountain dew or some pizza, come back in about 5 minutes and he'd be there. i killed him about 5 times the first time, 3 the next. the giant snake fang.. psh, if you need instructions on how to get these, you haven't been playing long enough. the aviak charm drops in south karana, and it's the only no-drop part of the quest. i've gotten 2 aviak charms, the first one, someone just shouted out the location for one. the second, i auctioned for the location of one, got it in under 5 minutes for 10pp. errak shickshank is in kerra isle, and if you haven't killed any kerrans, you should be fine. i invis, just in case. keep going forward, across the bridge, through that little gorge until you see some docks, she's in a hut right there. she conned indifferent to me the first time, and i still got my talisman. i got a full blue bubble of exp at level 22 for handing this stuff in, which is nothing to scoff at. every time i'm in south karana and someone shouts "aviak charm at blah blah bla..." i do it again. easy quest. me like.
▲ Page top
Bone Talisman
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2001 at 10:12 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Got mine last night - what an easy, no risk quest at this level. I'm only using it until I can get my Charred Guardian Shield, then I'm selling it. Hardest part is camping that stupid tiger. :-)

Don't give up on the Ak'anon zoo tiger.. I had to kill this sucker every time he popped for over two stinking hours before he gave me his skin :)
▲ Page top
Very Simple
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2001 at 10:19 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591752191797
Scholar
198 posts
Might be a good item for say a monk to carry around during pulls so he doesn't get rooted or nuked into oblivion.

let me clarify this one:
go to a hotkey bank where you have or can free up 2 hotkey buttons...
put your offhand melee 2 box in one of those buttons...
put an inventory slot where you keep this talisman or where you keep the bag it is in in the other of the two buttons...

now without opening inventory you can go to this hotkey bank and swap your offhand weapon or shield for this talisman during pulls, while fleeing from casters, or whenever having MR is favorable to AC or damage output and be able to switch back instantly.

Saw a monk pulling in hate with this trick so judge for yourself how useful it is and open your mind a little before you rant on someone who maybe has a better idea than you realized.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 07 2001 at 7:04 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) nt
Got one today
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2001 at 7:26 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Got this today. The hardest item to get is the Aviak Charm (and that isn't oo hard). But a nice low 20's item. I fought a caster after I got this and resisted two spells, and since it doesn't wiegh much I carry a shield with me in case I have to duke it out.

Druid of 23 seasons
